articles.title: The AI Medical Services Act: What It Gets Right & Falls Short
articles.summary: The regulatory sandbox for clinical AI is gaining traction after years of broken FDA pathways. Breakthrough device designation still takes years and costs millions.
articles.linkedin_angle: The FDA regulatory sandbox isn't just policy — it's the unlock healthcare AI has been waiting for. While everyone debates the details, the real opportunity is building governance-first platforms that work inside OR outside the sandbox.

articles.title: HHS Scales Back AI Transparency Requirements for EHR Software
articles.summary: The new administration is reducing FDA regulation of AI tools that help doctors make clinical decisions and lessening transparency requirements for EHR-integrated AI.
articles.linkedin_angle: HHS just reduced AI transparency requirements, creating the biggest governance opportunity in healthcare. When regulation steps back, private sector accountability becomes even more critical.

articles.title: Healthcare CIOs Enter The AI Maturity Era
articles.summary: Healthcare CIOs are shifting from AI pilots to true maturity, embedding AI into core operations while strengthening governance and accountability in 2026.
articles.linkedin_angle: Pilot fatigue is real. The CIOs winning in 2026 aren't running more AI experiments — they're building systematic governance that scales.

articles.title: AI Governance in 2026: Enterprises Scale Without Losing Control
articles.summary: AI no longer sits in isolated pilots. In 2026, it shapes underwriting, optimizes supply chains, detects fraud, and supports customer service in real time.
articles.linkedin_angle: AI governance isn't an IT problem anymore — it's a board-level business risk. The ISO/IEC standards provide the framework, but healthcare needs domain-specific implementation.

articles.title: AI Scribe Compliance Gap Widens
articles.summary: Ambient scribe spending grew 2.4x in 2025 to $600M revenue, with Nuance DAX, Abridge, and Ambience commanding the lion's share. Compliance programs lag behind implementation.
articles.linkedin_angle: The ambient scribe market hit $600M in 2025 but compliance is still catching up. Every healthcare org implementing AI scribes needs governance.

clinical_validation.quote: Every AI governance gap comes down to context that's missing from the training data or the real-time decision. LUMEN needs to know not just what the AI decided, but what the AI didn't consider that a human would have.
